title: elsholtzia angustifolia
intro: Elsholtzia angustifolia, also known as Vietnamese mint or Vietnamese basil, is a perennial herb native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elsholtzia angustifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Elsholtzia angustifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are often used fresh in cooking and herbal remedies.
